reasoning_chain: The street sign reads 'Carrera 11 / Calle 48', which is standard Colombian addressing using 'Carrera' for east-west streets and 'Calle' for north-south streets.

The chaotic overhead wiring and concrete utility poles are characteristic of urban infrastructure in many Colombian cities.
